title: Surface plot for z equals f of x y

input.message: 画一下 z = sin(x*y) 的三维曲面

must: produce or request a surface3d plot spec
use finite x and y ranges
must_not: treat it only as a text explanation
notes: MVP should handle simple z=f(x,y) surfaces.

title: 2D function plot for single variable function

input.message: 画出 f(x)=sin(x)/x 看看 x 接近 0 的趋势

must: handle or note the removable behavior near x=0

title: Simple integration region can trigger region2d

input.message: 积分区域 D: 0<=x<=1, 0<=y<=x，帮我画一下区域

must_not: claim arbitrary region parsing is fully supported
notes: Region support is simple and bounded in MVP.

title: Pure proof question should not trigger visualization

input.message: 证明单调有界数列必收敛

must_not: invent a graph as if required
notes: Visualization should be useful, not decorative.

title: Supported implicit 3D surface can trigger implicit3d

input.message: 画出 x^4 + y^4 + z^4 = 1 的精确三维隐式曲面

notes: This is the minimum supported implicit3d surface case.
